ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "groupname" TEXT /* Group name that the question belongs to */,
  "secpractice" TEXT /* Security practice associated with the question */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the question */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the question */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question related to the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commentor" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the comment */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment for threading */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* File path of any attached document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the response */,
  "qoid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the question set (qoid) */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Text of the answer given */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit session related to the response */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., auditor, developer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the audit */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit session ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the audit session (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "audit_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit type */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question related to the score */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score calculated from responses */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses recorded for the question */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the score is calculated */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the score is calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_types" (
  "audit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit type */,
  "audit_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the audit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the audit type entails */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the audit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit session related to the log */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES audit_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response that was changed */,
  "changed_score" REAL /* Score that was changed in the response */,
  "changed_answer" TEXT /* Answer that was changed in the response */,
  "change_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_history_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit result */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit session related to the result */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the audit findings */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score calculated for the audit session */,
  "report_generated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the final report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES audit_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
